title: polytrias diversiflora
intro: Polytrias diversiflora, also known as the Chinese Tassel Fern or Tassel fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polytrias diversiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or decoction, and it can also be consumed as a dried powder or added to soups and other dishes for its medicinal properties.
